items.title: Brian Thomas: Improving chemistry with QB1
items.body_text: Thomas has demonstrated increased chemistry with quarterback Trevor Lawrence during spring practices, Michael DiRocco of ESPN reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Malik Willis: Chemistry with WRs not there yet
items.body_text: Dolphins head coach Jeff Halfley said Tuesday at the start of mandatory minicamp that Willis building a rapport with his new pass-catching corps is "a work in progress," David Furones of the South Florida Sun Sentinel reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Baker Mayfield: Wants new contract before camp
items.body_text: Mayfield said Friday negotiations with the Buccaneers on an extension are ongoing and he would "love to have a long-term deal" beyond 2026, but talks are currently "not anywhere close" and he considers the start of training camp a firm negotiation deadline, Rick Stroud of the Tampa Bay Times reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
